title: Building a Live Set Without a Laptop
excerpt: When I decided to ditch the laptop, everyone thought I was crazy. Here's how I rebuilt my entire set around the MPC Live 2 and why I'd never go back to staring at a screen on stage.

title: Jazz Harmony on the MPC: Voicings That Don't Suck
excerpt: Most beat makers stay in pentatonic land. Bringing jazz voicings into sample-based production sounds intimidating — until you break down what's actually happening under the hood.

title: The Difference Between Playing Live and Performing Live
excerpt: There's a version of "live" where you hit play and tweak knobs. Then there's the version where every note is a real-time decision. I'm only interested in the second one.
